title: This Is a Sample Scheduled Post
date: 2026-12-31

excerpt: A placeholder scheduled post that keeps the scheduling flow exercised. It is dated far in the future, so it stays hidden from the blog, subscribe page, sitemap, and feed until then.
publishAt: 2099-01-01T09:00:00-04:00
---

This is a sample scheduled post. Its publish time is set far in the future, so it is not a published post yet: it does not appear on the blog, the subscribe page, the sitemap, or the RSS feed. It lives only here, under the drafts area, where I can preview how a post looks before it goes live.

Once its publish time passes, a post like this moves onto the blog on its own, with no deploy. If you have found this page, there is nothing to read yet. It is a placeholder that keeps the scheduling flow working while there is no real post waiting to go live.
